<!--
Thanks for contributing to Youtarr! Please review CONTRIBUTING.md before opening this PR.
Contributor PRs should target the `dev` branch, not `main`.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor / tooling / tests (`refactor:` / `chore:` / `test:`)

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR targets the `dev` branch (not `main`)
- [ ] Conventional commit format used (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint:ts` passes (TypeScript compiles)
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] New/changed code has accompanying tests
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior, config, or env vars changed
- [ ] No bypassed checks (`--no-verify`, `test.skip`, commented-out tests)
